description: src/plugin/runner.rs uses child.wait_with_output() which buffers the entire plugin stdout into memory, and there is no timeout. A misbehaving plugin can OOM bl or hang it forever. Fix: cap plugin stdout via a bounded reader (e.g. 1 MiB, configurable in .balls/config.json). Add a plugin timeout (default 30s, configurable). On overflow or timeout, kill the child and log a warning, return None. Tests: plugin that emits 2 MiB is rejected gracefully, plugin that sleeps 60s is killed after timeout.
title: Plugin runner: bounded output + timeout
